sample.title: The Black Book
sample.plot: After his son is framed for a kidnapping, a bereaved deacon takes justice into his own hands and fights a corrupt police gang to absolve him.

sample.title: The Dive
sample.plot: Two sisters go diving at a beautiful, remote location. One of the sisters is struck by a rock, leaving her trapped 28 meters below. With dangerously low levels of oxygen and cold temperatures, it is up to her sister to fight for h...

sample.title: Blended
sample.plot: After a blind date gone horribly wrong, Jim and Lauren agree they never, ever want to see each other again. Well, that's all about to change when the two find themselves and their respective families (including children) all stuck together in one suite at an African Safari vacation spot.

sample.title: Sentinelle
sample.plot: François Sentinelle has two lives. By day he is the most famous police officer on Reunion Island, known for his harsh methods and flowery shirts, who chases criminals in his 4x4. But the rest of the time, he is also a charismatic ...

sample.title: Horizon Line
sample.plot: A couple flying on a small plane to attend a tropical island wedding must fight for their lives after their pilot suffers a heart attack.

sample.title: My Octopus Teacher
sample.plot: After years of swimming every day in the freezing ocean at the tip of Africa, Craig Foster meets an unlikely teacher a young octopus who displays remarkable curiosity. Visiting her den and tracking her movements for months on end he eventually wins the animal's trust and they develop a never before seen bond between human and wild animal.

sample.title: Chappie
sample.plot: In Johannesburg, the police department reduced the high rating of criminality using robots from the Tetravaal Company, designed by the engineer Deon Wilson. The former military Vincent Moore is envious of Deon, since he has developed another project called Moose, but neither Tetravaal nor the police department is interested. Deon has just developed an Artificial Intelligence but the Tetravaal's CEO Michelle Bradley asks him to abort the project. Deon decides to bring the damaged Robot 22 that was sent to be crushed to test his A.I. However he is kidnapped by the criminals Ninja, Yo-Landi and Amerika that want him to stop the robot cops. When they see the damaged robot in the van, they force Deon to program it to heist banks with them and they call it Chappie. However, Chappie acts like a child and need to be trained to learn and grow. Meanwhile Vincent follows Deon and plots an evil scheme to activate his robot.

sample.title: The Old Guard
sample.plot: Led by a warrior named Andy (Charlize Theron), a covert group of tight-knit mercenaries with a mysterious inability to die have fought to protect the mortal world for centuries. But when the team is recruited to take on an emergency mission and their extraordinary abilities are suddenly exposed, it's up to Andy and Nile (Kiki Layne), the newest soldier to join their ranks, to help the group eliminate the threat of those who seek to replicate and monetize their power by any means necessary.

sample.title: Eraser: Reborn
sample.plot: U.S. Marshal Mason Pollard specializes in "erasing" people - faking the deaths of high-risk witnesses. With the technological advances of the last 25 years, the game has upgraded, and it's just another day at the office when he's assigned to Rina Kimura, a crime boss' wife who's decided to turn state's evidence. As the two flee to Cape Town, South Africa, with a team of merciless assassins on their trail, Pollard discovers he's been set up. Double-crossed and fueled by adrenaline, he needs to be at the top of his game, or he'll be the one who's erased. Permanently.

sample.title: His House
sample.plot: A refugee couple makes a harrowing escape from war-torn South Sudan, but then they struggle to adjust to their new life in an English town that has an evil lurking beneath the surface.

sample.title: Friend Request
sample.plot: Popular college student Laura (Alycia Debnam-Carey) has tons of friends, both on Facebook and IRL. She graciously accepts social outcast Marina's (Liesl Ahlers) online friend request, until Marina crosses the line and Laura unfriends her. To everyone's shock, Marina takes her own life in a ritual meant to torment Laura, which appears in a video posted on Laura's profile. Even though it wasn't Laura who posted the video, or other creepy content that begins appearing on her page, her Facebook friend count begins to dwindle as a result. When her real-life friends start dying mysterious, cruel deaths, Laura must figure out how to break the deadly curse before it's too late.

sample.title: A Weekend to Forget
sample.plot: Seven friends reunite for a weekend getaway after years of being apart. But things aren't as smooth as they hoped, as old tensions and unresolved issues resurface.

sample.title: Redemption Day
sample.plot: When the love of his life is kidnapped and held for ransom by terrorists, a war hero Brad Paxton races against the clock to rescue her in a daring and deadly operation that pits him against the most powerful and shadowy forces.

sample.title: Momentum
sample.plot: Alex, a mysterious thief, is pulled in by her former partner for one last heist and quickly finds it was never just about the diamonds. A brutal murder sparks a cat and mouse chase between Alex and a master assassin. Now she must uncover the lies behind the heist and discover the secrets behind the men who have made her a target.

sample.title: Beast
sample.plot: A father and his two teenage daughters find themselves hunted by a massive rogue lion intent on proving that the savanna has but one apex predator.

sample.title: Love, Sex and 30 Candles
sample.plot: Through a year of 30th birthdays, four best friends navigate relationships, heartbreak and a shocking situation that threatens to tear them apart.

sample.title: iNumber Number: Jozi Gold
sample.plot: When an undercover cop is tasked with investigating a historic gold heist in Johannesburg, he’s forced to choose between his conscience and the law.

sample.title: Close
sample.plot: Hired to protect a pampered mining heiress Zoe (Sophie Nélisse), bodyguard Sam (Noomi Rapace) finds herself tangled in a deadly conspiracy. When attackers target the heiress she's protecting, battle-hardened bodyguard Sam scrambles to save her client - and teach her how to fight back.

sample.title: Rhino Man
sample.plot: In the midst of the battle to save rhinos from extinction, a great anti-poaching ranger trainer, Martin Mthembu, has fallen, leaving a void in the fight. His close friend Ruben de Kock continues to honor his legacy by training the next generation of rangers, while friend and ranger sergeant, Anton Mzimba, holds the line against poachers out in the bush.

sample.title: Seal Team Eight: Behind Enemy Lines
sample.plot: While on an unsanctioned, covert mission in Africa, a small team of S.E.A.L.s uncovers intelligence pointing to the imminent sale of a massive quantity of weapons grade uranium. Now, with no mission prep and zero support, they have less than thirty six hours to fight their way past a ruthless warlord's army guarding this secret mining operation, hidden deep in the treacherous Congo, in order to secure the yellow-cake and expose the unknown buyer. One of America's greatest threats is about to obtain the final piece in becoming a true nuclear power and only Seal Team Eight can stop them.

categories.label: smartphones tying daily life together
categories.description: Cheap data plans and always-near handsets make messages, maps, payments, flirtation, and public scandal travel through the same small screen. What you'll see: chat windows, voice notes, front cameras, status updates, location pins, and whole arguments or emergencies unfolding online.

categories.label: platform fame turning people into brands
categories.description: Attention on social platforms can be turned into money, influence, and local celebrity, so public image becomes part of ordinary work and social standing. What you'll see: follower counts, sponsored posts, livestream personas, polished selfies, viral clips, and private trouble spilling into public feeds.

categories.label: police power tangled with graft
categories.description: Formal law exists, but in many settings uniforms, badges, and weapons are mixed up with bribery, political protection, and extra-legal force. What you'll see: roadblocks, back-room deals, rough interrogations, compromised officers, and citizens treating the police with both need and fear.

categories.label: private guns doing the state's work
categories.description: Security firms, bodyguards, mercenary crews, and heavily armed contractors often stand where public protection is weak or mistrusted. What you'll see: armored convoys, earpieces, tactical kit, guarded compounds, extraction teams, and violence carried out as a paid service.

categories.label: algorithms and machines entering public order
categories.description: Digital systems increasingly sort people, watch movement, and promise safer streets, while new machine intelligence is treated as both marvel and menace. What you'll see: camera networks, screen dashboards, automated targeting, robot enforcers, data-driven policing, and anxious talk about who controls the code.

categories.label: cities split between wealth and precarity
categories.description: Fast-growing African cities hold luxury towers, gated homes, informal settlements, and hustling street economies side by side. What you'll see: gleaming skylines over crowded districts, expensive cars beside minibuses, rooftop bars, cash shortages, and people moving constantly between rich and poor worlds.

categories.label: extractive wealth drawing violence and intrigue
categories.description: Gold, rare minerals, fuel, and other buried wealth attract foreign interests, criminal syndicates, and political fixers as much as they enrich nations. What you'll see: mine sites, smuggling routes, guarded shipments, businessmen with security details, and local ground scarred by the chase for resource money.

categories.label: wild landscapes managed for tourism and conservation
categories.description: Game reserves, coasts, reefs, and island waters are preserved, marketed, and patrolled as places of wonder, profit, and ecological struggle. What you'll see: safari lodges, ranger stations, anti-poaching patrols, charter planes, diving gear, and visitors meeting carefully managed wilderness.

categories.label: migration shaped by war and faraway borders
categories.description: Conflict, hardship, and unequal opportunity push many Africans into dangerous journeys, asylum systems, and lives split between homeland ties and foreign rules. What you'll see: border crossings, refugee paperwork, cramped housing, remittance-minded phone calls, and memories of violence intruding on new surroundings.

categories.label: english, local tongues, and global style mixing
categories.description: Urban Africa in the platform age is linguistically and culturally layered, with local speech, imported media, and international fashions blending in everyday life. What you'll see: code-switching, slang-heavy banter, Afrobeats and pop soundtracks, Western brand names, church clothes, clubwear, and hybrid city style.
